narrative:
Utica Village (precinct in Licking County) has 1,251 registered voters, with 60.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 28.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 11.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 17.0 percentage points.
